name: launchpad
description: Your personal AI job search assistant

scripts.dev:clean: sh -c 'pids=$(netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null | awk '\''/:3000[[:space:]]/ && /LISTEN/ { split($7,a,"/"); if (a[1] != "-" && a[1] != "") print a[1] }'\'' | sort -u); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then echo "Releasing port 3000 (PID: $pids)"; kill $pids; sleep 1; fi; next dev'
